identity.name: Yonge & Birch Residences
identity.address: 1196-1210 Yonge St & 2-8 Birch Ave, Toronto, ON (NW corner Yonge & Birch)

narrative.summary: Woodcliffe's boutique condo directly across from the Summerhill LCBO and North Toronto Station (restored by Woodcliffe in 2003). Originally a 14-storey, 67-suite boutique building — now revised to 32 storeys with 64 suites plus office space. Facade designed to extend the neighbourhood's traditional character along Yonge while the tower embraces contemporary architecture. Brian Gluckstein interiors.

development.status: Revised OPA/SPA returned to City Council (Nov 2025)

keyDates.label: Major revision
keyDates.note: Scaled to 32 storeys, added office, cut units, shifted rental replacement off-site
